policy.notes: Insurer policy wordings, claim forms, and network hospital lists must be added only from official insurer websites. Do not ingest blogs, aggregators, or random PDFs.

sources.title: IRDAI Document Library
sources.purpose: Insurance rules, circulars, regulations, and official document discovery

sources.title: IRDAI Health Department FAQs and Guidelines
sources.purpose: Health insurance definitions, waiting periods, claims timelines, portability, moratorium, and policyholder rules

sources.title: Master Circular on IRDAI Insurance Products Regulations 2024 - Health Insurance
sources.purpose: Authoritative health insurance product and claim rule reference

sources.title: IRDAI Consolidated and Gazette Notified Regulations
sources.purpose: Regulatory backing for insurance product and policyholder arguments

sources.title: IRDAI Circulars
sources.purpose: Latest official circular discovery for health insurance and claims

sources.title: IRDAI Policyholder Portal
sources.purpose: Consumer rights, insurance complaints, FAQs, and grievance process

sources.title: WHO Health Topics
sources.purpose: High-level disease and treatment background for medical understanding

sources.title: MedlinePlus Health Topics
sources.purpose: Patient-friendly disease, treatment, and procedure explanations

insurer_source_requirements.purpose: Coverage, exclusions, waiting periods, sub-limits, claims conditions
insurer_source_requirements.rule: Use only product pages or PDF downloads hosted on official insurer domains.

insurer_source_requirements.purpose: Claim submission workflow and required documents
insurer_source_requirements.rule: Use only claim/download pages hosted on official insurer domains.

insurer_source_requirements.rule: Use only network-hospital pages hosted on official insurer domains.
